content.heading: What are your details?
content.successContent: Since you've just joined us, we'll send you a couple of extra emails to introduce ourselves properly.
content.noJs: You need JavaScript enabled to be able to display our newsletter subscription form.

fields.name: Email
fields.label: Email address
fields.hint: We'll only use this to email you our newsletter.

validationMessages.email: Please ensure your email is in the correct format

fields.name: Country
fields.label: Country
fields.hint: Telling us where you live helps us to email the most relevant content to you.

fields.name: PostalCode
fields.label: Postcode
fields.hint: We'll only use this to email you local content and offers in our newsletter.

validationMessages.postcode: Please use a correct UK postcode

fields.name: conditionalText
fields.content: You've visited the UK before! Welcome back.

fields.name: termsNotice
fields.content: By submitting this form, you agree to our terms and conditions and privacy policy.
